creator: mario.pranjic@gmail.com
text:
I installed mimedefang-2.63 from ports collection, but when I try to start it via /usr/local/etc/rc.d/mimedefang.sh start, I get:

[root]# /usr/local/etc/rc.d/mimedefang.sh start
/usr/local/etc/rc.d/mimedefang.sh: 7: Syntax error: end of file unexpected (expecting "fi")

When I run it on some linux box I get no syntax error.

Looks like a issue with shells diferences on linux/freebsd to me, but not sure.

How-To-Repeat: /usr/local/etc/rc.d/mimedefang.sh start
